message:
feat(session): atomic persisted entry counter, autosave flush on shutdown, V2 corruption resilience

Session cloneability with independent state:
- session.rs: convert persisted_entry_count from usize to Arc<AtomicUsize>
  for concurrent-safe updates from background threads; implement custom
  Clone that deep-copies the atomic value so clones track state independently
- All loads/stores use SeqCst ordering for correctness
- New test: test_clone_has_independent_persisted_entry_count()

Graceful autosave flush on shutdown:
- main.rs: restructure control flow from early-return to unified result
  handling; clone session handle and call flush_autosave_on_shutdown()
  before process exit to drain pending writes and prevent data loss

V2 index rebuild resilience:
- session_store_v2.rs: on corrupt segment frame during index rebuild,
  log warning and skip instead of hard-failing; use saturating_add()
  for byte offset advancement; allows recovery from partially corrupted
  session store files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
